interface.longDescription:
Generate professional talking videos. Upload your own photo or choose an avatar, select from various languages, and get  results with perfect lip-sync. Ideal for social media, marketing, and training. 

How to Use in ChatGPT
1. Connect: Connect TalkGen to ChatGPT.
2. Trigger: Activate the app using one of these methods:
Type Commands: Simply type “@” then choose TalkGen, or type “TalkGen” in the chat box.
3. Create: That’s it!
defaultPrompt: Make short talking-avatar videos for freelance graphic design client updates
